request-2.text: Amanda was really responsive! She gave me exactly what I was looking for and some ideas and tips that I had never even thought of before. Thanks for all the help!

req-3-priya.text: Priya came through quickly with two strong engineer intros. Both were a great fit for what we were looking for. Really appreciated the fast turnaround!

request-1.text: Robert was incredibly generous with his time. The conversation gave me a much clearer picture of what the EM role actually looks like day-to-day.

request-3.text: Lisa's feedback on the flow was solid and she caught a few structural gaps I had missed. Would have loved more time on the visual polish side, but overall really useful.

helped-1.text: Sarah was so thoughtful with her feedback. She really took the time to go through every detail of the portfolio and offered specific, actionable suggestions.

helped-2.text: Michael's review was thorough and encouraging. He highlighted strengths I hadn't even noticed and gave me a clear path forward.

helped-3.text: Jessica was fantastic — she caught some key structural issues in my pitch deck and helped me reframe the market sizing section entirely.

helped-4.text: Priya's intro was warm and well-contextualized. The connection she made turned into a really promising conversation.

helped-5.text: Leo jumped on a call the same day and walked me through exactly what I needed. Really appreciated the speed and generosity.

helped-6.text: Camila's feedback was helpful on the strategic side, though we ran short on time before getting to the financial model. Still very useful overall.

helped-7.text: Jonah gave really candid feedback which is exactly what I asked for. He pointed out things others had been too polite to mention. Super valuable.

helped-8.text: Aisha made an excellent connection. The person she introduced me to was a perfect fit and we've already had two follow-up calls.

helped-9.text: Mateo was helpful and shared some good frameworks, though our schedules made it hard to go as deep as I'd hoped. Appreciated the effort.

helped-10.text: Nina's review of my case studies was exactly what I needed. She had a sharp eye for what hiring managers actually look for.

helped-11.text: Ethan was incredibly generous with his time and shared insights from his own transition that I found invaluable. Really grateful.

helped-12.text: Sofia and I had a good conversation but ultimately her background was in a different niche than I needed. Still appreciated her willingness to connect.
